title: Moon Fall SMP - Dark Mode
description: A custom GUI resource pack for an SMP server.
body:
# `Update 12/26/2025` - **Moon Fall Dark Mode has been archived.** - **The successor is [Duo Dark](https://modrinth.com/project/X4vcfvJn)** ———————————————————————
This is mainly a re-upload from another site.
**If it gains any traction here, I'll be sure to update it or create a spin-off version!** ———————————————————————
*Original Description:* Howdy y'all, Here's a resource pack I've been working on recently as a pet project for a towny survival server I play on.I have no idea what the design style is called, but I like it and have tried to incorporate it into most of the GUI. All survival containers have been initially redone, however, I plan on making them look more like their respective block while maintaining the same styling. Everything is very much a work-in-progress. Full release is coming soon, along with a list of everything that has been changed and everything that's planned! Additionally, I plan to make a more generalized version for those who like the style but not the server branding. Below are a couple other resource packs I have incorporated into this pack. I plan to make my own version of each when I get the time and/or know-how. - Better Fonts x32 - Colonel_Gerdauf - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-fonts - I have edited an already edited version of the Faithful x32 font textures. - Custom XP Colours – Enchanted_Games (PMC) - https://enchanted.games
